大殿是您城市中最核心的建筑物，也是一切文明发展的根基。它不仅仅象征着城市的灵魂，同时也作为重要的职能机构，决定着建设的规模，资源的采集，科技的研究任何部队的成长等方方面面的潜力。因此，对您的大殿进行升级能够全方位地提高您的战斗力和影响力
通过农作物来提供食物
与其在危机四伏的野外进行狩猎和采集来维持食物供给，我们机制的祖先选择了在一个固定场所来饲养牲畜和种植农作物。让人惊叹的是，这一切在距今12000年的新石器时代就已经发生了，人类的生存本能最终引领着我们实现了一个新的里程碑。
森林是大自然赐予人类最宝贵的礼物之一，对广袤的森林资源进行合理的利用本是一条可持续发展的完美道路，然而，由于工业革命之后机械急数的急速发展，人类对森林的过度砍伐已经对生态环境造成了严重的破坏。或许是时候放慢我们的脚步了，你说呢？
菜市场能够通过开采石料来为城市建设提供重要保障。早在三百四十万年前，现代人类的祖先已经学会了对不规则的石块进行打磨，从而制造出拥有棱角和锋利边缘的简单工具。石器时代的到来也标志着人类历史翻开了全新的篇章。
我们目前还无从得知人类到底是从什么时候真正开始开采黄金的，但是不可否认，那些发光的金制器具从几千年前就已然成为了尊贵的象征。从格鲁吉亚南部发现的距今超过5000年的地球上已知最早的金矿到堪称艺术品的现代采矿业机械巨兽，黄金的美丽似乎从未衰减。
修建兵营的目的在于更加合理地对军人进行管理，同时训练他们的战斗技巧和培养团结精神。最早的兵营，例如古罗马禁卫军营，通常被用来保存精英部队的力量。兵营往往选址考究，并将作战人员进行了高密度集中，故而拥有更强组织能力和更快部署反应等明显的优势。
森林里的小灵精虽然身材娇小，但精灵的天性使得他们具有百发百中的天赋。好战的精灵们为了锻炼自身的箭术设立了靶场，起初是为了大家交流训练，但由于战争的到来，靶场逐渐演变成对弓手军事需求的场所，越来越多的精灵在这里被锻炼为精准的神射手，他们不仅百发百中，还擅长单兵作战，实力强劲。
骁勇的骑兵需要依赖强健的野猪，而骑兵营则是驯养坐骑的关键一环。最早发现驯服野猪可以提供更为强大的战力的起因是一头野猪横冲直撞的将一个战士顶到了猪背上。战士在猪背上坐稳后竟然指挥野猪摧毁了整片森林。
最早有文献记载的提供疾病和损伤治疗的机构是古埃及的寺庙。无独有偶，在古希腊，奉祀医神的庙宇同样被用作医疗手段的实施地点。除此之外，古罗马帝国，古代印度和古代中国都存在着形式不同但职能一致的医疗机构，为普通民众，军队和贵族阶级提供医疗服务。

快速收取金币并获得金币的重要建筑

City Hall determines the level of other buildings

The City Hall is the core building of your city and the foundation of all civilization. It not only symbolizes the soul of your city, but also has an important function in determining the scale of construction, the gathering of resources, the research of technologies and the growth of your troops. Therefore, upgrading your city hall can increase your combat power and influence in all aspects.

Instead of hunting and gathering to provide food in a dangerous wilderness, our ancestors chose to raise livestock and plant crops in a fixed location. Amazingly, all this happened in the Neolithic Age, 12,000 years ago, and human survival instincts led us to a new milestone eventually.

Forests are one of the most precious gifts of nature to mankind, and the rational use of vast forest resources would have been a perfect path to sustainable development. However, due to the rapid development of machinery after the industrial revolution, humans' excessive logging of forests has caused serious damage to the ecological environment. Maybe it's time to slow down our pace, don't you think?

Vegetable markets are able to provide important security for urban construction by mining stone. As early as 3.4 million years ago, the ancestors of modern humans had learned to polish irregular blocks of stone to create simple tools with angles and sharp edges. The advent of the Stone Age also marked the beginning of a whole new chapter in human history.

There is no way to know when gold was actually mined, but there is no denying that the glowing gold instruments have been a symbol of prestige since thousands of years ago. From the earliest known gold mine on earth, over 5,000 years old, found in southern Georgia, to the mechanical behemoths of modern mining that are works of art, the beauty of gold never seems to wane.

Barracks were built to manage soldiers more rationally, while training them in combat skills and fostering a spirit of unity. The earliest barracks, such as those of the ancient Roman Praetorian Guard, were often used to preserve the strength of elite troops. Barracks were often carefully located and concentrated combatants in high densities, so they had obvious advantages such as greater organization and faster deployment response.

Although small in stature, the elves in the forest have a talent for hitting all shots by nature. The warlike elves set up a target range in order to exercise their archery skills, initially for everyone to exchange training, but due to the advent of war, the range gradually evolved into a place for the military needs of archers, where more and more elves were trained to be accurate archers, who can not only fire at the target a hundred times without a single miss, but also excel in single combat and have strong strength.

Primus cavalry relied on strong boars, and cavalry battalions were a key part of taming the mounts. The earliest discovery that taming boars could provide greater combat power started when a boar rammed a warrior onto the back of a boar. After the warrior was seated on the boar's back he actually commanded the boar to destroy an entire forest.

The earliest documented institutions that provided treatment for illness and injury were the temples of ancient Egypt. It is no coincidence that in ancient Greece, temples dedicated to the gods of healing were also used as places where medical treatments were administered. In addition, medical institutions that different in form but consistent in function also existed in the Roman Empire, ancient India and ancient China, providing medical services to the common people, the military and the aristocracy.
The worker class deserves a place to live

The Worker's Hut is a place where hard-working construction workers can rest in their daily life and is the only building in the city where you can manage the building queue. Here you can choose to spend gems to hire more workers to add an extra building queue, or you can use speed-up items to reduce the time it takes to build a queue.
The most famous scholars in the Empire are working on new technologies

Many believe that the concept of the Academy first took shape from the school founded by the famous ancient Greek philosopher Plato in Aldemi, Athens in 385 B. C. Throughout its long history, this institution has gradually become the core place of higher education and scientific research, producing countless talents and becoming an important backbone for the progress of human civilization.
An important building for collecting and obtaining gold quickly.

Wall-walls have long been an important part of human settlements, serving a variety of functions including administrative planning, division and military defense. The construction of the city wall is a very complicated project. In ancient times, when science was not developed, it basically relied on pure manpower. Thus, the great walls of the world are rightly called "miracles of man".
Recruit the most legendary commander in history

No one is born a hero, but a pure and noble heart will determine whether you can surpass yourself. In the tavern, you can get a glimpse of the world and meet all kinds of people, and whether there is hidden among them, the commander who is destined to write a legend for you. Maybe it's time to have a drink in the tavern, then organize your life and face your destiny.

Castles originated in the 9th century, after the fall of Carolingian Empire resulted in its territory being divided among individual lords and princes. Castles were built by these nobles to control the area immediately surrounding them, and served as both offensive and defensive structures.
Reached the maximum number of buildings

As one of the earliest military units, the club warriors were equipped with the most primitive weapons, relied mainly on brute force, and were less capable in combat as they often lacked sufficient training.

Swordsmen were the most common type of soldier in the armies of all countries, the sharp short swords equipped allowing them to make a good start on the battlefield through varied fighting styles, but somewhat helpless against archers.

Only the strongest men could wield the heavy battle axe. In addition, axes can be thrown to attack the enemy and are useful in defending against enemy cavalry, thus playing an important strategic role on the battlefield.
Swordsmen not only have good armor, but also have magnificent swordsmanship and great strength, making them invincible on the battlefield.
The elite swordsmen are the best armed, the most brutal in training and the most disciplined, and are under the command of a distinguished commander who seeks to conquer the entire world.
Known as horsemen because of their ability to ride boars, the boars' warlike character makes them swift and brave in battle, and they can be of great use when fighting in groups.
Their ability to control the boars allows them to tame more powerful boars, but often taming these boars already consumes most of their energy.
Not only do they tame the wild boars, but they are also strong enough to adapt to various tactics and always act as the main force in the army.
Battle-hardened horsemen, in addition to their own extraordinary fighting ability, they are also the leaders of the troops in the execution of strategic tactics.

Only those who have the qualifications of a king can ride the King of Barbarian Pigs. The reason why they are called kings not only explains their dominant position, but also represents unquestionable strength and honor.
Elves are poor in attack and damage, so the use of bow and arrow is their basic means to protect themselves and hunt their prey.
Through hard training, elves with a talent for combat make their bows and arrows very accurate, and they are the elite field fighters with unique skills among elves.
The Phantom Archers are the elite archer unit of the Elves. They are not only good at camouflage, but also have a phantom-like figure, which increases their damage significantly.
The Secret Archers are powerful enough to deter any intruders with evil intentions. Even the heavy armor is not enough to resist the power of the arrow.
Their hard life has trained them and given them good defensive abilities. They put lava on the tips of their arrows. During battle, they will shoot these arrows at their enemies.

When the player has insufficient space in the inner city, troops cannot be built. \nUpgrading to unlock the shelter to collect soldiers to build more soldiers. \nYou cannot continue to build soldiers when both the shelter and inner city space are full.

Era: Determines the level of soldiers that can be produced, the higher the unit, the higher the attack power, defense, HP and other basic attributes, the combat power will become higher. \n Upgrading buildings to enter a new era, you can only build all soldiers of this era and the soldiers with the highest level in the lower era in the higher era.
Attack power: Represents the ability of a unit to deal damage in battle, and by increasing attack power, you can destroy your opponent faster in battle.
Defense: Represents the unit's ability to resist attacks in battle, increasing defense will help the unit fight longer on the battlefield.
HP: Represents the unit's ability to withstand damage in battle. Improving HP allows the unit to survive better in battle.
Marching Speed: Represents the unit's speed of movement on the map. When multiple types of units are in the same troop, the troop marching speed is determined by the slowest unit.
Load: Represents the maximum amount of resources a unit can carry while gathering on the map
Battle Power: Represents the overall combat capability of the unit
The damage received will increase if you are countered by a unit, and the damage dealt to the unit that counters you will decrease.
